title: Distant Voices
description:
The Distant Voices Client. 
Designed for multiplayer, feels like singleplayer.
body:
# This pack is in development. if you would like to give feed back and be up-to-date with when the servers are online you can join the [discord](https://discord.gg/uFWYnrDfvC).

# What is the Distant Voices Client?
Distant Voices (or The Distant Voices Client) is a client/pack designed primarily for use on the Distant Voices server.
\
The Client/Pack hosts a large variety of mods used to create the experience of an almost singleplayer experience by removing almost all communication methods between players execept for proximity voice chat and radios/radio stations that players have to setup themselves.

Player name tags no longer show and players can rename themselves with a name tag to appear as someone else in the proximity text chat. Players can also disguse as other players skins by equiping the players head.
